channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Former VA cybersecurity chief issues dire warning about data belonging to millions of veterans
item.description: Sensitive financial and health data belonging to millions of veterans and stored on a benefits website is at risk of being stolen or otherwise compromised, according to a federal employee tasked with cybersecurity who was recently fired as part of massive government-wide cuts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Hinge’s new feature wants to help trans and neurodivergent daters
item.description: Dating apps are a notoriously hostile space towards transgender users. If they list their transness in their profiles, they’re outing themselves to the world. If they don’t, matches could accuse them of catfishing. Picking the right time to tell matches can feel impossible.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Netflix is building a global audience by empowering Arab creatives
item.description: When Netflix reality show Dubai Bling debuted in 2022, it became a global sensation, garnering viewers across 51 countries. And it’s kept up the momentum: The show’s recently released third season racked up 18.6 million hours of viewing time in its first week alone.
item.dc:creator: Javeria Khalid, Fast Company

item.title: Packaged offerings promise to make AI infrastructure deployment easier
item.description: Most enterprises deploying AI technology have been turning to hyperscalers such as Amazon, Google and Microsoft to provide all the necessary infrastructure. According to IDC data released this month, cloud and shared environments account for most AI server spending — 72% in the first half of 2024.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Alexa Plus Pricing Revealed: $19.99 Per Month or Free with Prime Subscription
item.description: Amazon has announced the pricing for its new Alexa Plus assistant, which will cost $19.99 per month or be free to Amazon Prime subscribers.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: A new Linux backdoor is hitting US universities and governments
item.description: Auto-color granted its operators full access to compromised endpoints, allowing them to run malware remotely, and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Foundation season 3 isn't out yet on Apple TV+, but a fourth season is reportedly on the way with a new showrunner
item.description: Foundation has apparently puts its season 3 problems behind it with a new showrunner and a secret season 4 renewal.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Malware exposes 3.9 billion passwords in huge cybersecurity threat
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy offers tips on how you can protect your devices against infostealer malware, which was used to infect 4.3 million machines last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opkey Unveils AI-Powered ERP Lifecycle Optimization Platform
item.description: Opkey's agentic AI-powered platform simplifies ERP management, reduces costs by up to 50%, and reduces testing time by as much as 85%
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Sony Unveils FE 400-800mm F6.3-8 G OSS and FE 16mm F1.8 G Lenses for Full-Frame Cameras
item.description: Sony has introduced two new lenses for its full-frame cameras, including the first-ever telephoto lens with an 800mm reach, the FE 400-800mm F6.3-8 G OSS, and a wide-angle prime lens, the FE 16mm F1.8 G.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Satya Nadella says AI is yet to have its Excel moment
item.description: Microsoft CEO thinks AI should be measured in its contribution to an economy, rather than benchmarks of intelligence.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Trump shares AI video envisioning Gaza development with gold statue of president
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday evening shared a video produced using artificial intelligence (AI) that showcases his proposals for the potential development of the war-torn Gaza Strip, complete with a golden statue of his likeness and beachfront skyscrapers rising from the rubble.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: What the private sector can teach government about cloud computing
item.description: Cloud computing has been at the forefront of government IT strategies for many years. When cloud computing first became a thing in 2008, the government led the way, including NIST creating a definition of cloud computing. I worked closely with them then and watched the whole thing play out.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple shareholders reject proposal to scrap company's diversity programs
item.description: Apple shareholders rebuffed an attempt to pressure the technology trendsetter into joining President Donald Trump’s push to scrub corporate programs designed to diversify its workforce.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition
item.description: Learn how OSINT is shaping the future of intelligence and security. The post OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network
